objective: Add `carto rm <title>` to delete a node and all its connected edges from the knowledge graph.
key_changes: src/store/graph.ts: add pure function removeNode(title) returning {node, edgeCount} | null
src/cli.ts: import removeNode, wire rm Commander subcommand with chalk output
src/store/graph.test.ts: add describe('removeNode') with not-found, orphan, and cascade tests
removeNode loads graph, filters nodes/edges, calls save() — same pattern as addNode/link
Cascading delete: removeNode filters out all edges where from or to equals node.id
cli.ts success: chalk.green('✓ Removed "%s" and %d edge(s)'); error: chalk.red + exit 1
ESM: all relative imports use explicit .js extensions per project convention
graph.ts stays pure functions — no singleton state, no classes; all I/O in cli.ts
Existing CART-B01 test (mkdirSync ordering) remains untouched as regression guard
npm test, build, lint all must pass before commit
No data model changes — existing Node/Edge/Graph types are sufficient
Offline-only: no network or external dependency introduced
